name: No Hold Buttons
description: Switches out a bunch of long-press button prompts with with normal press

options.name: Generic
options.tooltip: Controls a whole bunch of interactions in the game, too many to list. This will change most long press holds to single press interactions.

options.name: Doors
options.tooltip: Switches long-press door interaction to the Open Door button for instant use

options.name: Card Reader
options.tooltip: Makes card reader instant press by switching it to the Open Door button

options.name: Poison
options.tooltip: Switches poison action to use the Open Door key for instant press interaction

options.name: Item Dump
options.tooltip: Containers where you can conceal items, like trash bins

options.name: Freelancer
options.tooltip: Misc freelancer stuff. Not needed with Generic enabled. Talk checkbox works for suppliers.

options.name: ----- Options Below This Line PROBABLY Not Needed -----
options.tooltip: If you checked all the boxes above this line, that should cover pretty much all the long press prompts in the game. Checkboxes below this were added earlier and only change the long press to hold instead of switching to the open door button, which can cause conflicts with opening doors if the prompt is near a door.

options.name: Exits
options.tooltip: Exit mission prompts. Not needed with Generic enabled.

options.name: Stove Gas Leak - Fire Button
options.tooltip: Switches Gas Leak to the fire button, feels nice

options.name: Blend
options.tooltip: Blend in. Not needed with Generic enabled.

options.name: Dump Body (not working yet)
options.tooltip: Don't use this, it does nothing. Use the 'Generic' option for instant body dumps in containers

options.name: Misc
options.tooltip: Misc other prompts, these are PROBABLY all covered by Generic and the other options, so you most likely don't need this option.
